data.title: Dow Declines 200 Points, Falls For A Second Day: Fear & Greed Index Remains In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed a slight decrease in fear levels, though it remained in the "Extreme Fear" zone. On Thursday, U.S. stocks saw a decline, with the Dow Jones index falling by over 200 points for the second consecutive session. During a joint appearance with Japan's Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi at the White House, President Donald Trump mentioned Iran being "close to demolished" and suggested the situation would be resolved soon, stating that Kharg Island could be targeted if necessary. Accenture plc (NYSE: ACN) reported positive earnings for the second quarter and offered a cautious forecast. Additionally, Envela Corp (NYSE: ELA) saw a 31% surge in its shares following better-than-expected results. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Forward Industries, a SOL treasury company, uses crypto debt to repurchase shares, aiming to increase per-share value after a six-month decline.
data.description: The corporation plans to utilize its cryptocurrency reserves in order to finance a share repurchase, which aims to decrease the number of outstanding shares. This strategic move is anticipated to elevate the per-share value, especially following a continuous decline over the past six months.

data.title: Ribo expands beyond the liver with RiboPepSTAR™ - enabling targeted siRNA delivery to multiple organs
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Suzhou Ribo Life Science Co., Ltd. was invited to speak at the RNA Leaders Europe Conference in Vienna, Austria on March 19th. The company, listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange with the code 6938, presented at the prestigious event.

data.title: Milestone Pharmaceuticals Gears Up For Q4 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Milestone Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: MIST) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on March 20. Analysts are predicting a quarterly loss of 16 cents per share for the Montreal-based company, with expected revenue of $1.20 million. David Sandoval was recently appointed as the general counsel and chief compliance officer on Feb. 10. The company's shares closed at $1.70 on Thursday. For further insights, readers can refer to Benzinga Pro's Analyst Stock Ratings page for the latest analyst ratings based on various criteria. Visit Benzinga.com for the complete coverage.

data.title: Most crypto wallets are not equally vulnerable to quantum risk, according to Galaxy Digital's Will Owens, with ongoing efforts to address the threat.
data.description: According to Will Owens from Galaxy Digital, the majority of cryptocurrency wallets are not at risk from quantum computing threats. He also mentioned that efforts are underway to mitigate this risk through significant advancements in the field.
A 4.1 magnitude earthquake shook Firuzabad County in Fars Province on Friday morning.

data.title: SEC chair stated agency could defer to market structure bill if passed by Congress, but seeks "bridge" for crypto rules clarification.
data.description: The Chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has indicated that the agency would prioritize a market structure bill if approved by Congress. However, there is a requirement for an interim solution or a "bridge" to provide clarity on the regulation of cryptocurrencies. This signifies a willingness to potentially shift focus towards addressing regulatory concerns in the crypto space.

data.title: Animoca backs Ava Labs with investment to grow Avalanche in Asia, Middle East, offering capital, advice, and biz dev for real-world assets and digital ID.
data.description: A Web3 company has announced plans to offer funding, guidance, and assistance for Avalanche projects looking to expand. Their support will particularly target initiatives centered around real-world assets and digital identity, aiding in the scaling process.
